methodology_gate.inconclusive_policy: Inconclusive/data-pending runs receive reciprocal links but do not count in the public scoreboard until the run produces a public non-untested verdict.
methodology_gate.not_selected_by: observed verdicts or desired scoreboard effect
methodology_gate.score_caution: These are associational triage runs and are intentionally lower-weight than bespoke causal replications.
methodology_gate.selection_rule: All hypothesis YAML files added by HEAD and produced by the 2026-05-22 swarm promotion.
methodology_gate.verdict_policy: No verdicts changed; first-pass generic panel diagnostics are made public via replication wrappers.
